1: And this is love, that we walk according to His commandments. This is the commandment, even as you heard from the beginning, that you should walk in it.
If anyone comes to you and does not bring this teaching, do not receive him into your house, and do not say to him, Greeting!
For he who says to him, Greeting, shares in his evil works.

9.text: The teaching here refers specifically to the truth of Christ's deity and His incarnation. To deny these is to have the 'antichrist' spirit, and such heresy must be strictly rejected.
